findings.issue: Page should have exactly one H1
findings.fix: Use one H1 for the page topic and lower heading levels for sections.

findings.issue: Images have generic or empty-looking alt text
findings.evidence: https://www.culture.ru/: 43 suspicious alt values; sample:
findings.fix: Replace generic alt text with content-specific descriptions, or mark decorative images intentionally.

findings.issue: Skip link was not detected by static scan
findings.evidence: https://www.culture.ru/: No obvious skip-link href/text found
findings.fix: Add a visible-on-focus skip link to the main content if absent.

findings.issue: Some form controls may not have labels
findings.evidence: https://www.culture.ru/: controls: 1, labels: 0, aria labels on controls: 0
findings.fix: Associate every input/select/textarea with a visible label or aria-labelledby.
Add `<html lang="ru">` or the correct page language.
Make link text self-contained, e.g. `Подробнее о спектакле ...` instead of `Подробнее`.

findings.evidence: https://www.culture.ru/live: 68 images missing alt; sample:
findings.fix: Add meaningful alt text for informative images or `alt=""` for decorative images.
